title: SpecSeed
description: Output of concept-identification when a candidate passes all five Spec-diagnostic tests. One seed per identified spec.

kind.description: Discriminator: distinguishes a SpecSeed from a ConceptSeed.

name.description: Spec name, recognizable to authors and developers.

description.description: Brief description of what the spec is about.

source.description: 'new' for greenfield specs, 'existing' for specs surfaced from an existing system or demoted from a concept.
